examples: Fanny is sitting there on the settee, just as she was in the oleograph.
Why don't you lie down on the settee.
We sat primly at either end of a long settee.
In the white foyer, an antique settee upholstered in natural linen and a simple domed light fixture were the only adornments.
Mrs Gibson, a care assistant, said she checked the usual places Sonny liked to hide, such as behind the settee and in wardrobes.
